primary_question: Does this window define a medium-term board direction or is it only media heat
minimum_context: Need event text plus time-aligned board context around the policy date
success_criteria: Correctly separate national/ministry/industrial anchors from media-only stories
notes: This is the root task because all later routing depends on whether direction is real.

primary_question: Is this event a fresh tradable leg or only an old theme echo
minimum_context: Need prior theme history and at least one pre-event context window
success_criteria: Correctly identify whether a catalyst creates new expansion rather than narrative repetition
notes: This directly addresses the user's concern that not every good headline creates a new move.

primary_question: Is the board moving broadly or only structurally through a narrow slice
minimum_context: Need board constituents or representative breadth proxies across the same window
success_criteria: Correctly classify broad-based rally versus selective subtheme rally versus failed diffusion
notes: This teaches the system to distinguish board-wide repricing from local spikes.

primary_question: Is the move actually funded or mostly headline-driven
minimum_context: Need turnover and relative participation around the event window
success_criteria: Correctly separate capital-driven rebound from headline-only rebound
notes: This is the core bridge from news to tradability.

primary_question: Even if the narrative is right can the stock actually be traded now
minimum_context: Need symbol-level structure and board context together
success_criteria: Correctly classify tradable_now vs watch_only vs not_tradable
notes: This is the final gate that links policy and news to stock selection.

primary_question: Did a later small catalyst act as ignition confirmation diffusion or mere rebound
minimum_context: Need a top-down anchor window followed by at least one smaller catalyst window
success_criteria: Correctly identify how small catalysts behave once the main policy direction already exists
notes: This task is specific to the user's航天学习目标 and should be central to the sample band.
